scope_boundary: Only the bounded synthetic compact-generation/GVR receipt claim moves to synthetic-test-backed: the validator recomputes one public-safe literal baseline, selects one exact compact generator-plus-repair receipt, rejects lossy exactness, negative-rate/no-fallback, and bounded-search-overrun controls, and checks a finite Lean fixture bridge with matching byte counts and receipt outcomes.
transition_reason: The local validation command checked five tracked compact-generation receipt records. It kept the literal baseline at 368 bytes, selected receipt://repeat-generator-plus-repair at 78 bytes with exact reconstruction, explicit repair residual, fallback, residual owner, exact-replay policy, and bounded search, and reported a 78.8 percent synthetic byte reduction versus the literal baseline. It rejected receipt://lossy-summary-marked-exact because verification failed and reconstruction mismatched, rejected receipt://negative-rate-no-fallback because it was larger than the literal baseline and had no fallback despite exact reconstruction, and rejected receipt://bounded-search-overrun because it exceeded the declared search bound, did not run verification, lacked exact-replay policy, and reconstructed the wrong target. This supports only the narrow recorded receipt-discipline claim, not deployed compression, codec correctness, semantic utility, model quality, benchmark performance, or chapter core claims.
required_artifacts: Lean fixture alignment with receipt constructors, byte counts, selected receipt, and rejected controls
negative_results: receipt://lossy-summary-marked-exact is smaller at 55 bytes but rejected because verification_result is fail and exact reconstruction is false
receipt://negative-rate-no-fallback reconstructs exactly but is rejected because it is 485 bytes versus the 368-byte literal baseline and fallback is missing
receipt://bounded-search-overrun is rejected because search_steps 5 exceeds search_bound 2, verification is not run, exact replay is not allowed, and exact reconstruction is false
no chapter core claim is promoted above argument
no deployed compression, codec correctness, fallback execution, semantic utility, model-quality, benchmark, source-interpretation, safety, or ASI outcome is claimed
downgrade_triggers: validator fails to reject the lossy exactness negative control
validator fails to reject the negative-rate/no-fallback negative control
validator fails to reject the bounded-search-overrun negative control
selected receipt no longer reconstructs exactly
selected receipt is not smaller than the literal baseline
result record drifts from recomputed byte counts or selected receipt
Lean fixture bridge drifts from the public JSON/result fixture
chapter prose interprets this slice as deployed compression, codec correctness, model quality, benchmark performance, source interpretation, safety, ASI, or chapter-core evidence
promotion_burden: Broader compact-generation or compression claims require a separate accepted transition with a real codec or generator, independent verifier or reconstruction harness, corpus or task suite, downstream utility metrics, fallback execution traces, semantic/consumer-policy tests, public-safe implementation artifacts, independent review where relevant, and explicit non-claims.
limitations: local deterministic validation rather than a deployed compact generator or codec
toy repeat rule rather than learned generation
exact string equality rather than semantic verification
single synthetic target rather than a corpus
does not measure model quality, benchmark quality, semantic utility, compression utility over workloads, fallback execution, or safety outcomes
does not promote any chapter core claim above argument
reviewer_independence: local maintainer-agent review only; not an independent external audit
non_claims: does not promote any chapter core claim
does not prove compression utility, codec correctness, semantic utility, model quality, or benchmark performance
does not prove deployed generator, verifier, fallback execution, or reconstruction behavior outside this synthetic fixture
does not prove source interpretation, ASI capability, governance effectiveness, safety, or runtime behavior
does not replace future real compression, GVR, RankFold, BBVCA, Theseus, Circle, external-review, or corpus-backed evidence
